In [1]:
import numpy as np 
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
%matplotlib inline
In [2]:
Forest_fires = pd.read_csv('amazon.csv', encoding='latin1')

In [10]:
ffpy = pd.DataFrame(Forest_fires.groupby('year')['number'].sum().reset_index())

plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))
sns.lineplot(x='year', y='number', data=ffpy, color='green', lw=2)
plt.xlabel('Year')
plt.ylabel('Number of fires')
plt.title('Total Number of Fires in Brazil per Year', fontsize=17)
plt.xlim(1998,2017)
plt.xticks(np.arange(1998, 2018, 1),fontsize=12)
plt.yticks(fontsize=12)
Out[10]:
(array([15000., 20000., 25000., 30000., 35000., 40000., 45000.]),
 [Text(0, 15000.0, '15000'),
  Text(0, 20000.0, '20000'),
  Text(0, 25000.0, '25000'),
  Text(0, 30000.0, '30000'),
  Text(0, 35000.0, '35000'),
  Text(0, 40000.0, '40000'),
  Text(0, 45000.0, '45000')])
In [11]:
fps = pd.DataFrame(Forest_fires.groupby('state')['number'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).reset_index())
fig,ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))
ax = sns.barplot(data=fps,x='state',y='number')
ax.set(xlabel='State',ylabel='Total Number of Fires',title='Total Number of Fires by State')
plt.xticks(rotation='vertical')
plt.show()
In [12]:
fpm = pd.DataFrame(Forest_fires.groupby('month')['number'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).reset_index())

plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))
sns.barplot(data=fpm, x='month', y='number')
plt.title('Number of fires in Brazil per month', fontsize=17)
plt.xlabel('Month')
plt.ylabel('Number of fires')
plt.xticks(rotation=80)

In [13]:
df1 = pd.DataFrame(data=Forest_fires[Forest_fires['state'] =='Rio'])
df2 = pd.DataFrame(data=Forest_fires[Forest_fires['state'] =='Paraiba'])
df3 = pd.DataFrame(data=Forest_fires[Forest_fires['state'] =='Mato Grosso'])
df4 = pd.DataFrame(data=Forest_fires[Forest_fires['state'] =='Bahia'])
df5 = pd.DataFrame(data=Forest_fires[Forest_fires['state'] =='Sao Paulo'])

plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))

df_list = [df1, df2, df3, df4,df5]
df_group = []
for x in df_list:
    x.groupby('year')['number'].sum().reset_index()
    df_group.append(x)

for x in df_group:
    sns.lineplot(x='year', y='number', data=x, label=x['state'].iloc[0],lw=2, errorbar=None)
    plt.title('Number of Fires in top 5 states in Brazil', fontsize=17)
    plt.xlabel('Year')
    plt.ylabel('Number of fires')
    plt.xticks(np.arange(1997,2017,1), rotation=80)
    plt.xlim(1998,2017)

plt.legend(fontsize=15)
Out[13]:
<matplotlib.legend.Legend at 0x25dd7747e50>
